channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-4814] Interop 2.5.1<->2.6 failure on test suite lustre-rsync-test test_7: Failure in replication; differences found.
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: http://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/f938df94-b244-11e3-a93f-52540035b04c.

The sub-test test_7 failed with the following error:

Failure in replication; differences found.

client console

06:06:43:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == lustre-rsync-test test 7: lustre_rsync stripesize == 06:04:57 (1395493497)
06:06:43:LustreError: 11-0: lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ffff8800706afc00: Communicating with 10.10.4.211@tcp, operation mds_getxattr failed with -34.
06:06:43:LustreError: 12735:0:(vvp_io.c:1215:vvp_io_init()) lustre: refresh file layout [0x200000400:0x57f9:0x0] error -34.
06:06:43:LustreError: 11-0: lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ffff8800706afc00: Communicating with 10.10.4.211@tcp, operation mds_getxattr failed with -34.
06:06:43:LustreError: 12735:0:(vvp_io.c:1215:vvp_io_init()) lustre: refresh file layout [0x200000400:0x57fa:0x0] error -34.
06:06:43:LustreError: 11-0: lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ffff8800706afc00: Communicating with 10.10.4.211@tcp, operation mds_getxattr failed with -34.
06:06:43:LustreError: Skipped 30 previous similar messages
06:06:43:LustreError: 12735:0:(vvp_io.c:1215:vvp_io_init()) lustre: refresh file layout [0x200000400:0x5805:0x0] error -34.
06:06:43:LustreError: 12735:0:(vvp_io.c:1215:vvp_io_init()) Skipped 18 previous similar messages
06:06:43:LustreError: 11-0: lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ffff8800706afc00: Communicating with 10.10.4.211@tcp, operation mds_getxattr failed with -34.
06:06:43:LustreError: Skipped 95 previous similar messages
06:06:43:LustreError: 12735:0:(vvp_io.c:1215:vvp_io_init()) lustre: refresh file layout [0x200000400:0x5815:0x0] error -34.
06:06:43:LustreError: 12735:0:(vvp_io.c:1215:vvp_io_init()) Skipped 47 previous similar messages
06:06:43:LustreError: 11-0: lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ffff8800706afc00: Communicating with 10.10.4.211@tcp, operation mds_getxattr failed with -34.
06:06:43:LustreError: Skipped 189 previous similar messages
06:06:43:LustreError: 12735:0:(vvp_io.c:1215:vvp_io_init()) lustre: refresh file layout [0x200000400:0x5834:0x0] error -34.
06:06:43:LustreError: 12735:0:(vvp_io.c:1215:vvp_io_init()) Skipped 94 previous similar messages
06:06:43:LustreError: 11430:0:(mdc_locks.c:904:mdc_enqueue()) lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ffff8800706afc00: ldlm_cli_enqueue failed: rc = -2
06:06:43:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark  lustre-rsync-test test_7: @@@@@@ FAIL: Failure in replication\; differences found. 
06:06:43:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lustre-rsync-test test_7: @@@@@@ FAIL: Failure in replication; differences found.
item.summary: Interop 2.5.1<->2.6 failure on test suite lustre-rsync-test test_7: Failure in replication; differences found.

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.
